problem.title: Bellman-Ford Algorithm
problem.description:
Problem: Compute shortest path from source and detect negative weight cycles using Bellman-Ford.

Input:
- n vertices
- m edges (u,v,w)

Output:
- Shortest distances OR NEGATIVE CYCLE

solution.explanation: Relax all edges n-1 times; if any edge can still be relaxed after that a negative cycle exists. Distances are printed or "NEGATIVE CYCLE" if detected.
